page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Taxonomy based sorting of deleterious missense mutations across species.

LIST-S2: Taxonomy based sorting of pathogenic missense mutations across species.

LIST-S2 predicts the deleteriousness of amino acid mutations in protein sequences based on Taxonomy distances.
